root_cause: Agent made unnecessary tool calls when the ground truth expected no tools to be called for this customer service inquiry.
explanation: The agent called three tools (find_user_id_by_name_zip, get_user_details, get_order_details) when the expected behavior was to make no tool calls at all. While the agent followed authentication policies and provided helpful information, the task apparently required handling this customer concern without accessing backend systems. The extra tool calls made the interaction suboptimal but still functional.
